pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile for Java 21 features if the compiler source/target remains at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.annotation-api dependency to replace removed javax.annotation module.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation was removed from the JDK in Java 11; code using @Generated or similar annotations will fail to compile without the explicit Jakarta dependency.
